response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical curiosity, and a track record of building scalable systems and open-source tools, but lacks explicit evidence of leading large-scale experimentation platforms, AI-driven growth systems, or cross-team instrumentation frameworks — key requirements for a Principal IC6 role.
strengths: Proven experience building distributed, high-throughput systems (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Strong open-source contributions and tooling expertise (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, DLang libraries)
Demonstrated ability to work across languages and domains (TypeScript, C++, DLang, mobile, embedded)
concerns: No clear evidence of designing or owning experimentation frameworks, feature flagging, or growth measurement systems
Limited visibility into statistical analysis, bias detection, or risk controls in experimentation contexts
AI tooling usage mentioned vaguely (AI-agent infrastructure) without concrete impact or scale
